subcodes.first_line: He, before Whom is the Preserved Tablet, maketh mention of thee. The servant who standeth present hath brought thy letter and read it before His countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ح س یذکرک من عنده لوح حفیظ قد حضر العبد الحاضر بکتابک و قرئه تلقاء الوجه ان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
